# youtube-legend-cli

[English](llms.txt) | [Português Brasileiro](llms.pt-BR.txt)

> Non-interactive Rust CLI for downloading YouTube subtitles through third-party providers via a native Unix stdin/stdout interface.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/README.md): quickstart, flags, exit codes, install
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history following Keep a Changelog 1.1.0
- [API reference](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli): full rustdoc for every public item
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): dev workflow, MSRV, style
- [SECURITY](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/SECURITY.md): supported versions, threat model, reporting
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Contributor Covenant 2.1
- [docs/agent-teams-workflow.md](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/docs/agent-teams-workflow.md): the Agent Teams playbook used to deliver v0.2.6
- [docs/decisions/0009-cargo-toml-ownership-in-parallel-tasks.md](https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli/blob/main/docs/decisions/0009-cargo-toml-ownership-in-parallel-tasks.md): ADR-0009 (Cargo.toml serialisation under Agent Teams)

## Architecture
- clap-derived `Cli` with seven global flags and ten mode-specific flags
- top-level `commands::run` dispatches between single-URL extract and batch mode
- `ProviderChain` walks `ProviderA` then `ProviderB` with one-request-per-second throttling; falls back to `ProviderHeadless` when the `headless` Cargo feature is enabled
- `retry::retry_with_backoff` wraps each upstream call with 1s/2s/4s attempts and honours `Retry-After` (delta-seconds or RFC 2822 date)
- `provider::robots` consults the upstream `robots.txt` before any request; `Disallow` is reported as `EX_UNAVAILABLE`
- `cache` persists `(video_id, language, format)` blobs under `~/.cache/youtube-legend-cli/` with a 24h TTL
- `error::AppError` is a `thiserror` enum mapped to BSD `sysexits.h` exit codes (64, 65, 66, 69, 70, 78)
- `mimalloc` is the global allocator; `secret_endpoints` and `text` are `pub(crate)` only

## Modules
- [cli](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/cli/index.html): clap-derived argument parser and the Cli struct (17 flags incl. the 7 globals)
- [commands](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/commands/index.html): top-level dispatch between single-URL extract and batch mode
- [provider](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/provider/index.html): Provider trait, ProviderA, ProviderB, ProviderChain, robots checker, optional ProviderHeadless
- [parse](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/parse/index.html): SRT text extraction and YouTube URL/video-id parsing
- [cache](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/cache/index.html): TTL-keyed local files at ~/.cache/youtube-legend-cli
- [retry](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/retry/index.html): exponential backoff and in-memory circuit breaker
- [io](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/io/index.html): stdin/stdout/TTY helpers
- [error](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/error/index.html): AppError enum and BSD sysexits.h exit-code table
- [logging](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/logging/index.html): tracing subscriber initialiser with EnvFilter precedence
- [crypto](https://docs.rs/youtube-legend-cli/latest/youtube_legend_cli/crypto/index.html): AES-256-CBC plus PBKDF2 for provider-B signing
- text is `pub(crate)` and not re-exported; reach via the crate root only

## Companion binaries
- `youtube-legend-cli` — the subtitle fetcher
- `snapshot` — probes both providers and writes redacted HTML snapshots for drift detection (consumes gitignored `src/secret_endpoints.rs`)

## Install
- `cargo install youtube-legend-cli` from crates.io
- `cargo install --path .` from a local checkout
- Download a release binary for x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, x86_64-pc-windows-msvc, x86_64-apple-darwin, or aarch64-apple-darwin

## Stream contracts
- stdout is reserved for the subtitle body (or the --json envelope)
- stderr is reserved for logs, progress, and human error messages
- stdin accepts a single URL, a batch of one URL per line, or --batch flag input

## Optional
- Source: https://github.com/daniloaguiarbr/youtube-legend-cli
- License: dual MIT OR Apache-2.0
- MSRV: 1.88.0
- Categories: command-line-utilities (the web-programming::scraping slug was deprecated on crates.io, see v0.2.7)
- 12 CI jobs including deny, audit, public-api sigilo gate, semver-checks, cargo-install, matrix-os
